message:
fix(core): resolve asupersync-runtime compile errors in tests + benches

- Add join!/select! macro re-exports for asupersync-runtime feature in
  runtime_compat (futures::join for asup, tokio::select as temp bridge)
- Add watch_changed() async helper abstracting Cx parameter for
  asupersync watch::Receiver::changed()
- Fix proptest_runtime_compat: use mpsc_send/mpsc_recv_option helpers
  instead of direct channel calls that require &Cx under asupersync
- Fix parking_lot Mutex::lock() misuse across 6 files: parking_lot
  returns guard directly (not Result), remove erroneous .expect() calls
  in lab_smoke, tailer_labruntime, labruntime_overhead bench,
  distributed_merge_dpor, web_streaming_dpor
- Fix spike_comparison bench: add missing mut on mpsc receiver

All targets compile clean for both default and vendored+asupersync-runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
